summary.en: A global cryptocurrency derivatives exchange, positioned as a Coinbase for derivatives.
summary.zh: 全球加密貨幣衍生品交易所,定位為衍生品領域的 Coinbase。

highlight.en: Globe created the bitcoin VIX and the first low-latency perpetual futures exchange, focusing on advanced crypto derivatives products.
highlight.zh: Globe 推出了 bitcoin VIX,以及首個低延遲永續期貨交易所,專注於進階加密衍生品產品。

summary.en: An AI-native biotech building a multimodal platform for modality-agnostic drug discovery.
summary.zh: 一家 AI 原生生技公司,打造模態無關藥物發現的多模態平台。

highlight.en: 1910 integrates massive multimodal data, frontier AI models, and high-throughput lab automation to discover both small and large molecule therapeutics.
highlight.zh: 1910 整合海量多模態資料、前沿 AI 模型與高通量實驗室自動化,以發現小分子與大分子療法。

summary.en: Open-access research and data on the world's largest problems, from poverty to climate change.
summary.zh: 關於世界最大問題的開放取用研究與資料,涵蓋貧窮到氣候變遷。

highlight.en: A free, open-source public good with 3,405 interactive charts across 297 topics, used by millions monthly and cited in research and media worldwide.
highlight.zh: 一個免費、開源的公共財,涵蓋 297 個主題、3,405 張互動圖表,每月數百萬人使用,並被全球研究與媒體引用。

summary.en: A fulfillment platform helping Southeast Asia e-commerce sellers build self-run operations.
summary.zh: 協助東南亞電商賣家建立自營出貨營運的履約平台。

highlight.en: AllSome offers Fulfillment-as-a-Service with no upfront fee, 99.99% on-time shipping, and up to 50% cost savings for sellers.
highlight.zh: AllSome 提供履約即服務,無前期費用、99.99% 準時出貨,並為賣家節省高達 50% 的成本。

summary.en: Generative AI that creates stunning fashion images for eCommerce; acquired by Farfetch.
summary.zh: 以生成式 AI 為電商打造出色時尚圖片的公司,已被 Farfetch 收購。

highlight.en: From a single garment photo, a brand can produce unlimited images on any model and size, lifting conversion without on-site models or photographers.
highlight.zh: 只需一張服裝照片,品牌即可在任何模特與尺寸上生成無限圖片,無需現場模特或攝影師即可提升轉換率。

summary.en: A non-profit building open-source voting machines for US elections.
summary.zh: 一家為美國選舉打造開源投票機的非營利組織。

highlight.en: VotingWorks uses open-source software and off-the-shelf hardware to make elections safer, more accessible, and more affordable than aging proprietary systems.
highlight.zh: VotingWorks 採用開源軟體與現成硬體,讓選舉比老舊的專有系統更安全、更易用、更實惠。

summary.en: A platform that helps independent workers set up and manage their own benefits; acquired.
summary.zh: 協助獨立工作者建立並管理自身福利方案的平台,已被收購。

highlight.en: Catch automatically withholds from each paycheck for taxes, time off, savings, and retirement, and helps users enroll in the right health plan.
highlight.zh: Catch 自動從每筆薪資中提撥稅金、休假、儲蓄與退休金,並協助使用者投保合適的健康保險方案。

summary.en: A back office platform and employer of record for staffing firms.
summary.zh: 為人力派遣公司提供後勤平台與名義雇主服務。

highlight.en: Ascen provides employer-of-record and back office infrastructure purpose-built for the staffing industry.
highlight.zh: Ascen 提供專為人力派遣產業打造的名義雇主與後勤基礎設施。

summary.en: A platform that lets users interact with data through natural language; acquired.
summary.zh: 讓使用者以自然語言與資料互動的平台,已被收購。

highlight.en: Users connect their apps and data, ask questions like "Show me revenue for 2018," and receive personalized data insights.
highlight.zh: 使用者連接自己的應用與資料,提出如「顯示 2018 年的營收」之類的問題,即可獲得個人化的資料洞察。

summary.en: A patient intelligence platform for severe, complex genetic diseases.
summary.zh: 針對重症、複雜遺傳疾病的病患情報平台。

highlight.en: Probably Genetic finds undiagnosed patients online and uses machine learning and at-home testing to help them reach diagnoses, trials, and treatments earlier.
highlight.zh: Probably Genetic 在線上找出未確診的病患,並運用機器學習與居家檢測,協助他們更早獲得診斷、臨床試驗與治療。

summary.en: A brand offering frozen beauty products.
summary.zh: 提供冷凍美妝產品的品牌。

highlight.en: NaturAll Club centers its consumer beauty line on a distinctive frozen product format.
highlight.zh: NaturAll Club 以獨特的冷凍產品型態打造其消費美妝產品線。

summary.en: A security toolkit giving medical device vendors built-in cybersecurity in a few lines of code.
summary.zh: 讓醫療器材廠商以少量程式碼即內建資安功能的安全工具組。

highlight.en: MedCrypt's networked installs use machine-learning transaction monitoring to detect anomalies in real time and enable threat sharing between device vendors.
highlight.zh: MedCrypt 的連網安裝以機器學習交易監控即時偵測異常,並讓器材廠商之間共享威脅情報。

summary.en: A platform that small-to-midsize insurance companies use to run their entire business.
summary.zh: 中小型保險公司用來營運整個業務的平台。

highlight.en: AI Insurance replaces spreadsheets and filing cabinets that waste up to 60% of revenue, doing for insurers what Salesforce did for SMB sales teams.
highlight.zh: AI Insurance 取代浪費高達 60% 營收的試算表與檔案櫃,如同 Salesforce 之於中小企業銷售團隊那樣服務保險公司。

summary.en: A company brain that replaces Slack to keep teams mission-aligned by design.
summary.zh: 取代 Slack、從設計上讓團隊保持使命一致的「公司大腦」。

highlight.en: Convictional unifies goals, email, meetings, chat, and knowledge search in one place so a team's effectiveness compounds.
highlight.zh: Convictional 將目標、電子郵件、會議、聊天與知識搜尋整合於一處,讓團隊效能持續累積。

summary.en: A biotech working to solve drug resistance for cancer.
summary.zh: 致力解決癌症抗藥性的生技公司。

highlight.en: ResistanceBio focuses specifically on overcoming the problem of drug resistance in cancer treatment.
highlight.zh: ResistanceBio 專注於克服癌症治療中的抗藥性問題。

summary.en: An online school teaching Chinese speakers in-demand digital skills.
summary.zh: 教導華語人士熱門數位技能的線上學校。

highlight.en: CareerTu teaches digital marketing, data analytics, and product design via capstone projects; over 250 top companies hired its students across 14 countries.
highlight.zh: CareerTu 透過真實世界的專題實作教授數位行銷、資料分析與產品設計,逾 250 家頂尖公司在 14 個國家錄用其學員。

summary.en: E-signatures with built-in identity verification for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲提供內建身分驗證的電子簽章。

highlight.en: Keynua uses short video signatures to approve documents and verify identity against official records and social profiles, notarizing each on the blockchain.
highlight.zh: Keynua 以短影片簽名同時核可文件並比對官方紀錄與社群資料驗證身分,並在區塊鏈上完成交易公證。

summary.en: A company building autonomous trucks to fully automate long-haul freight shipping.
summary.zh: 打造自動駕駛卡車以全面自動化長途貨運的公司。

highlight.en: Mars Auto focuses entirely on full self-driving technology for long-haul freight trucks.
highlight.zh: Mars Auto 全力專注於長途貨運卡車的全自動駕駛技術。

summary.en: Outbound AI agents for the education, insurance, and travel industries.
summary.zh: 為教育、保險與旅遊產業提供主動外撥的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: OutRival's agents call, text, and email to drive revenue through millions of proactive conversations monthly, with companies live in under two weeks.
highlight.zh: OutRival 的代理透過每月數百萬次主動對話撥打電話、發送簡訊並撰寫郵件以帶動營收,客戶可在兩週內上線。

summary.en: Modern fundraising software for political campaigns and nonprofits.
summary.zh: 為政治競選與非營利組織打造的現代募款軟體。

highlight.en: Numero's all-in-one suite combines a donor CRM, email/text broadcasting, and payment pages, serving thousands of clients who manage over $10B in contributions.
highlight.zh: Numero 的一站式套件整合捐款者 CRM、郵件/簡訊群發與付款頁面,服務數千名客戶,管理逾 100 億美元捐款。

summary.en: A home-buying alternative offering ownership benefits with the flexibility of renting; acquired.
summary.zh: 提供兼具自有住宅優勢與租屋彈性的購屋替代方案,已被收購。

highlight.en: ZeroDown makes an all-cash offer to buy a chosen home, then lets the buyer build toward ownership as part of each payment goes toward equity.
highlight.zh: ZeroDown 以全現金報價買下選定的房子,讓買家在每期付款中部分轉為股權,逐步累積房屋所有權。

summary.en: A company creating automation technology for the cannabis industry.
summary.zh: 為大麻產業打造自動化技術的公司。

highlight.en: Sorting Robotics builds automation hardware purpose-built for cannabis production workflows.
highlight.zh: Sorting Robotics 打造專為大麻生產流程設計的自動化硬體。

summary.en: A tech-driven nonprofit helping low-income Americans overcome debt and rebuild credit.
summary.zh: 以科技驅動、協助低收入美國人擺脫債務並重建信用的非營利組織。

highlight.en: Born in Harvard Law's Access to Justice Lab, Upsolve's free DIY bankruptcy tool has helped over 14,000 families relieve more than $600M in debt.
highlight.zh: 源自哈佛法學院司法可近性實驗室,Upsolve 的免費自助破產工具已協助逾 1.4 萬個家庭解除超過 6 億美元的債務。

summary.en: An all-in-one delivery OS that lets any business offer delivery.
summary.zh: 讓任何企業都能提供配送服務的一站式配送作業系統。

highlight.en: FIRST brings all orders into one place, dispatches each to the best available courier, and manages the post-purchase experience for any business.
highlight.zh: FIRST 將所有訂單彙整於一處,將每筆訂單派給最佳可用配送服務,並管理售後體驗;其創辦團隊先前已完成逾百萬筆配送。

summary.en: Furnished co-living apartments for international students.
summary.zh: 為國際學生提供的附傢俱共居公寓。

highlight.en: Union Apartment targets international students with ready-to-move-in furnished co-living spaces.
highlight.zh: Union Apartment 鎖定國際學生,提供可即時入住的附傢俱共居空間。

summary.en: A company building autonomous robots for retail.
summary.zh: 為零售業打造自主機器人的公司。

highlight.en: Taobotics develops autonomous robotics aimed at retail environments.
highlight.zh: Taobotics 開發針對零售環境的自主機器人技術。

summary.en: One of India's largest crypto investing platforms.
summary.zh: 印度最大的加密貨幣投資平台之一。

highlight.en: Mudrex offers a wide range of crypto products at low cost, packaged in a simple, well-liked app.
highlight.zh: Mudrex 以低成本提供多樣的加密產品,並整合於一款簡單且受用戶喜愛的應用程式中。

summary.en: A peer-to-peer online learning platform for in-demand skills in India.
summary.zh: 印度的點對點線上學習平台,教授熱門技能。

highlight.en: Edyst reports over 80% course completion (8x the industry average), 95 minutes of daily use, and a 50% placement ratio.
highlight.zh: Edyst 表示其課程完成率逾 80%(業界平均的 8 倍)、每日使用 95 分鐘,就業媒合率達 50%。

summary.en: AI-driven learning, content, and coaching for sales teams.
summary.zh: 為銷售團隊提供 AI 驅動的學習、內容與教練服務。

highlight.en: Flockjay combines learning, content, and performance management in one place so teams can share best practices, coach faster, and speed up onboarding.
highlight.zh: Flockjay 將學習、內容與績效管理整合於一處,讓團隊分享最佳實務、更快進行教練輔導並加速新人上手。

summary.en: A digital bank.
summary.zh: 一家數位銀行。

highlight.en: Parker delivers banking services through a fully digital platform.
highlight.zh: Parker 透過全數位平台提供銀行服務。

summary.en: A tech-enabled business and employment litigation law firm.
summary.zh: 以科技賦能的商業與雇傭訴訟律師事務所。

highlight.en: Spire Law represents businesses and owners in litigation, with Spire Tech Services supporting its technology development and marketing.
highlight.zh: Spire Law 代理企業與業主處理訴訟,並由 Spire Tech Services 支援其技術開發與行銷。

summary.en: Monitors properties for hail damage to help insurers respond faster.
summary.zh: 監測房產冰雹損害,協助保險公司更快回應。

highlight.en: WeatherCheck analyzes geo-weather data to alert when severe hail strikes a property, giving insurers dynamic insight into their exposure.
highlight.zh: WeatherCheck 分析地理氣象資料,在嚴重冰雹襲擊房產時發出警示,讓保險公司動態掌握其風險曝險。

summary.en: A platform that fixes data quality in product analytics.
summary.zh: 修正產品分析中資料品質問題的平台。

highlight.en: Avo helps teams like IKEA, Wolt, and Condé Nast plan, implement, and monitor analytics with better tracking-plan management and ongoing data validation.
highlight.zh: Avo 協助 IKEA、Wolt、Condé Nast 等團隊規劃、實作並監控分析,提供更佳的追蹤計畫管理與持續的資料驗證。

summary.en: A defense-tech company building a heads-up display for soldiers.
summary.zh: 為士兵打造抬頭顯示器的國防科技公司。

highlight.en: Ravn's lightweight HUD streams feeds from gun cameras, drones, and robots, letting soldiers see around corners and react while behind cover.
highlight.zh: Ravn 的輕量抬頭顯示器串流來自槍械攝影機、無人機與機器人的影像,讓士兵能看見轉角後方並在掩護下反應。

summary.en: The first autonomous tax firm for companies operating across borders.
summary.zh: 首家為跨境營運企業服務的自主稅務公司。

highlight.en: Caribou connects finance and HR systems to graph every entity, process, and employee into a model called the Atlas, replacing scattered law and tax firms.
highlight.zh: Caribou 串接企業的財務與人資系統,將每個實體、流程與員工繪製成名為 Atlas 的模型,取代分散的法律與稅務事務所。

summary.en: An in-store analytics AI assistant for retail stores, like Google Analytics for physical shops.
summary.zh: 為實體零售店打造的店內分析 AI 助理,如同實體店的 Google Analytics。

highlight.en: Aura Vision turns retailers' existing security cameras into plug-and-play AI that measures customers and stores to help drive more sales.
highlight.zh: Aura Vision 將零售商既有的監視攝影機轉為即插即用的 AI,衡量顧客與門市以協助提升銷售。

summary.en: A connected network of smart health machines across India.
summary.zh: 遍布印度的智慧健康機聯網。

highlight.en: Pulse's IoT-enabled "Make in India" health machines have run over 600,000 check-ups, mass-screening for risk factors like obesity and hypertension.
highlight.zh: Pulse 的物聯網「印度製造」健康機已進行逾 60 萬次健檢,針對肥胖與高血壓等風險因子進行大規模篩檢。

summary.en: AI-powered corporate learning for accelerated employee growth and skill-building.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的企業學習,加速員工成長與技能養成。

highlight.en: Tailor-ED uses an AI bot to identify knowledge gaps and deliver personalized training paths that integrate into daily workflow via Slack and Teams.
highlight.zh: Tailor-ED 以 AI 機器人辨識知識缺口,提供個人化訓練路徑,並透過 Slack 與 Teams 融入日常工作流程。

summary.en: A tuition collection service for K-12 private schools in Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲 K-12 私立學校提供的學費收繳服務。

highlight.en: Schoolable pays school fees upfront for parents on flexible monthly plans, giving schools up to 80% of expected fees within two weeks of resumption.
highlight.zh: Schoolable 以彈性月付方案為家長預先墊付學費,讓學校在開學兩週內可取得高達 80% 的預期學費。

summary.en: AI software for instantly manufacturable fashion design.
summary.zh: 用於即時可量產時尚設計的 AI 軟體。

highlight.en: PatternFast lets brands design and launch collections in minutes, saving 90% of time and 95% of costs with production-ready patterns and automated sizing.
highlight.zh: PatternFast 讓品牌在數分鐘內設計並推出系列,以可量產的版型與自動化尺寸,節省 90% 時間與 95% 成本。

summary.en: A company developing flying motorcycles and compact VTOL aircraft.
summary.zh: 開發飛行摩托車與緊湊型垂直起降飛行器的公司。

highlight.en: JetPack Aviation builds rotor-free VTOL aircraft that can operate in cities with no rotor-strike risk, aiming to ship cargo across cities in minutes.
highlight.zh: JetPack Aviation 打造無旋翼的垂直起降飛行器,可在城市環境運作且無旋翼撞擊風險,目標在數分鐘內跨城運送貨物。

summary.en: A cell-based clean shrimp company, the first cultivated meat firm in Singapore and SE Asia; acquired.
summary.zh: 以細胞培養生產潔淨蝦肉的公司,新加坡與東南亞首家培養肉企業,已被收購。

highlight.en: Shiok Meats uses cellular agriculture to grow seafood from cells in the lab, aiming for the same taste, texture, and nutrients without harming animals.
highlight.zh: Shiok Meats 運用細胞農業在實驗室以細胞培養海鮮,力求保留相同的口味、口感與營養,且不傷害動物。

summary.en: A company producing nuclear materials used in cancer-treating nuclear medicine; acquired.
summary.zh: 生產用於治癌核醫的核材料的公司,已被收購。

highlight.en: Atomic Alchemy is building a bank of reactors to produce Molybdenum-99, the basis of 80% of nuclear medicine procedures now reliant on aging foreign reactors.
highlight.zh: Atomic Alchemy 正建立反應爐群以生產鉬-99——80% 核醫程序的基礎,目前仰賴老舊的境外反應爐供應。

summary.en: A data platform for restaurants; acquired by Thanx.
summary.zh: 為餐廳打造的資料平台,已被 Thanx 收購。

highlight.en: ZeroStorefront connects, warehouses, and routes data from the two dozen-plus apps a typical restaurant uses to improve analytics, marketing, and operations.
highlight.zh: ZeroStorefront 串接、儲存並調度典型餐廳所用的二十多個應用程式資料,改善分析、行銷、營運與財務。

summary.en: A daily planner for busy professionals that organizes work one day at a time.
summary.zh: 為忙碌專業人士打造、每次只規劃一天工作的每日計畫工具。

highlight.en: Sunsama imports tasks and meetings from your tools each morning so you set realistic goals, stay focused during the day, and shut down feeling accomplished.
highlight.zh: Sunsama 每天早上從你的工具匯入任務與會議,協助你設定務實目標、白天保持專注,並在收工時感到充實。

summary.en: A unified API for financial data aggregators; later shut down.
summary.zh: 金融資料聚合服務的統一 API,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Fuse provides a single API and consistent data model across vendors like Plaid, MX, Teller, and Yodlee, routing users to the most reliable bank connection.
highlight.zh: Fuse 提供單一 API 與一致的資料模型,整合 Plaid、MX、Teller、Finicity、Yodlee 等供應商,並將使用者導向最可靠的銀行連線。

summary.en: Large-scale genomic data mining software for comparing whole human genomes; later shut down.
summary.zh: 用於比對全人類基因組的大規模基因組資料挖掘軟體,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Spiral Genetics trains ML algorithms to compare large genome populations at scale, powering novel diagnostics and drugable targets for testing firms and pharma.
highlight.zh: Spiral Genetics 訓練機器學習演算法以大規模比對龐大基因組族群,為檢測公司、政府與藥廠驅動新型診斷與可成藥標靶的發現。

summary.en: A marketplace for furnished monthly rentals and compatible housemates; later shut down.
summary.zh: 提供附傢俱月租房與合拍室友的市集平台,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Kopa lets people browse rentals, find roommates, and book and pay for spaces online for 1-12 month stays.
highlight.zh: Kopa 讓使用者線上瀏覽租屋、尋找室友,並預訂與付款 1 至 12 個月的住宿。

summary.en: A design tool that lets engineers and designers build React components visually; acquired.
summary.zh: 讓工程師與設計師以視覺化方式建構 React 元件的設計工具,已被收購。

highlight.en: Visly enables engineers and designers to collaborate in one tool and create high-quality components that import directly into code with existing tooling.
highlight.zh: Visly 讓工程師與設計師在單一工具中協作,建立可透過既有工具鏈直接匯入程式碼的高品質元件。

summary.en: The company built the world's first automated digital pathology lab.
summary.zh: 打造全球首座自動化數位病理實驗室的公司。

highlight.en: Instapath focuses on automating digital pathology, aiming to streamline how tissue samples are processed and analyzed.
highlight.zh: Instapath 專注於自動化數位病理,目標簡化組織樣本的處理與分析流程。

summary.en: An app that brings your most important groups closer together; acquired.
summary.zh: 讓你最重要的群體更加緊密的應用程式,已被收購。

highlight.en: Cocoon provides a private space to gather with tools to keep close groups connected and writing their ongoing story as a unit.
highlight.zh: Cocoon 提供私密的聚集空間與工具,讓親密群體保持連結,並以一個整體持續書寫共同的故事。

summary.en: An AI-driven professional engineering firm for renewable energy projects; later shut down.
summary.zh: 為再生能源專案服務的 AI 驅動工程顧問公司,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Traverse uses AI and high-performance computing to speed prospecting and feasibility work 10x, finding the best wind-farm and dam sites across whole countries.
highlight.zh: Traverse 運用 AI 與高效能運算將選址與可行性評估加速 10 倍,在整個國家範圍內找出最佳的風場與水壩選址。

summary.en: A company that turns CO2 into battery-grade graphite and oxygen.
summary.zh: 將二氧化碳轉化為電池級石墨與氧氣的公司。

highlight.en: Maple Materials' electrolysis process could produce battery-grade graphite anode material at one-third the cost, and be carbon-negative on renewables.
highlight.zh: Maple Materials 的電解製程有望以三分之一成本生產電池級石墨負極材料,且在再生能源供電下可達到碳負排放。

summary.en: A company building next-generation DNA sequencing technology.
summary.zh: 打造次世代 DNA 定序技術的公司。

highlight.en: XGenomes sequences directly on single DNA molecules with zero library prep, targeting unprecedented accuracy and a consumables cost under $10 per sequence.
highlight.zh: XGenomes 直接在單分子 DNA 上定序、無需文庫製備,目標達成前所未有的準確度,且每次定序耗材成本低於 10 美元。

summary.en: A tool that brings all your apps together for fast, fluid workflow; acquired.
summary.zh: 將所有應用整合於一處、實現快速順暢工作流程的工具,已被收購。

highlight.en: Slapdash builds a low-latency file system for cloud apps, driven by the world's fastest Command Bar interface to make computer work less tedious.
highlight.zh: Slapdash 為雲端應用打造低延遲檔案系統,以全球最快的命令列介面驅動,讓電腦工作更輕鬆。

summary.en: Safety and quality software for industrial sectors; acquired.
summary.zh: 為工業領域提供的安全與品質軟體,已被收購。

highlight.en: WorkClout's SaaS centralizes employee training, troubleshooting, safety and quality procedures, and performance tracking to improve production efficiency.
highlight.zh: WorkClout 的 SaaS 整合員工訓練、故障排除、安全與品質程序及績效追蹤,以提升生產效率。

summary.en: A subscription media community for the South Asia-curious.
summary.zh: 為對南亞感興趣者打造的訂閱制媒體社群。

highlight.en: The Juggernaut targets the US South Asia diaspora, a fast-growing demographic with over $1 trillion in spending power, backed by Precursor Ventures and others.
highlight.zh: The Juggernaut 鎖定美國南亞裔族群——一個成長快速、消費力逾 1 兆美元的群體,獲 Precursor Ventures 與 Twitch 共同創辦人等投資人支持。

summary.en: No-code web app testing for everyone; acquired.
summary.zh: 人人可用的無程式碼網頁應用測試工具,已被收購。

highlight.en: Preflight is 20x faster than writing Selenium or Cypress tests and adapts to page changes by updating selectors automatically when a test passes.
highlight.zh: Preflight 比撰寫 Selenium 或 Cypress 測試快 20 倍,並在測試通過時自動更新選擇器以因應頁面變動。

summary.en: AI-powered personalized videos at scale; acquired.
summary.zh: 以 AI 大規模生成個人化影片的公司,已被收購。

highlight.en: With Windsor, someone records one video and sends millions of versions with unique names, companies, and locations, each looking personally recorded.
highlight.zh: 使用 Windsor,只需錄製一支影片,即可發送數百萬個帶有獨特姓名、公司與地點的版本,每支看起來與聽起來都像親自錄製。

summary.en: A company building digital payments infrastructure; acquired by Brex.
summary.zh: 打造數位支付基礎設施的公司,已被 Brex 收購。

highlight.en: Elph focused on building digital payments infrastructure before being acquired by Brex.
highlight.zh: Elph 專注於打造數位支付基礎設施,後被 Brex 收購。

summary.en: A company building $1,000 Amazon Go-style autonomous stores; later shut down.
summary.zh: 打造 1,000 美元 Amazon Go 式無人商店的公司,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Maitian.ai ran a computer-vision grab-and-go marketplace where partners like restaurants handled logistics in exchange for more customers and a sales cut.
highlight.zh: Maitian.ai 經營以電腦視覺驅動的拿了就走市集,連鎖餐廳等夥伴負責物流,以換取更多顧客與每筆銷售的分潤。

summary.en: An assessment tool that evaluates people to predict future job success.
summary.zh: 評估人員以預測未來工作成功的測評工具。

highlight.en: Pyxai's AI-driven assessment focuses on soft skills as the best indicator of long-term success, claiming 30%+ better retention and 50%+ faster hiring.
highlight.zh: Pyxai 的 AI 驅動測評聚焦軟實力作為長期成功的最佳指標,宣稱可提升 30% 以上的留任率並縮短逾 50% 的招募時間。

summary.en: A travel planner for researching, organizing, and mapping your trip.
summary.zh: 用於研究、整理與規劃路線的旅遊行程規劃工具。

highlight.en: Wanderlog is a design-focused trip app where users track plans in a collaborative document, discover places and hotels, and share advice with fellow travelers.
highlight.zh: Wanderlog 是注重設計的一站式旅遊應用,讓使用者在協作文件中追蹤計畫、探索景點與飯店,並與旅伴分享建議。

summary.en: An AI-powered headless CMS built for teams that move fast.
summary.zh: 為快速行動團隊打造的 AI 驅動無頭 CMS。

highlight.en: Cosmic pairs a sub-100ms REST API, SDK, CLI, and MCP server with AI agents that live in Slack to write content, build features, and deploy apps autonomously.
highlight.zh: Cosmic 結合低於 100 毫秒的 REST API、TypeScript SDK、CLI 與 MCP 伺服器,以及駐於 Slack 的 AI 代理,可自動撰寫內容、開發功能並部署應用。

summary.en: Contest automation software; acquired by FuboTV.
summary.zh: 競賽自動化軟體,已被 FuboTV 收購。

highlight.en: Balto cuts the time and manual labor needed to manage contests, giving operators easy tools to run, track, and communicate with thousands of players.
highlight.zh: Balto 大幅減少管理競賽所需的時間與人力,讓營運者以簡易工具經營、追蹤並與數千名參與者溝通。

summary.en: Upgrades disabled-accessible doors so they can be operated remotely; later shut down.
summary.zh: 升級無障礙門使其可遠端操作的公司,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Portal Entryways retrofits existing accessible doors to enable smartphone-based, contactless operation.
highlight.zh: Portal Entryways 改裝既有的無障礙門,實現以智慧型手機進行的非接觸式操作。

summary.en: A company building living cell therapies for pets first, then their people.
summary.zh: 先為寵物、後為人類打造活細胞療法的公司。

highlight.en: LEAH Labs' virus-free gene editing platform engineers CAR-T cell therapy for dogs with lymphoma at around $500 a dose, with early results inducing remissions.
highlight.zh: LEAH Labs 的無病毒基因編輯平台以約 500 美元一劑為患淋巴瘤的狗打造 CAR-T 細胞療法,早期結果已誘導緩解。

summary.en: Smart gels for local drug delivery to the gut.
summary.zh: 用於腸道局部給藥的智慧凝膠。

highlight.en: Intact is developing an advanced materials platform to improve how drugs are delivered and absorbed in the digestive tract for underserved GI disorders.
highlight.zh: Intact 正開發先進材料平台,改善藥物在消化道的遞送與吸收,以治療長期被忽視的腸胃疾病。

summary.en: A super-fast workspace for notes, tasks, and files; later shut down.
summary.zh: 用於筆記、任務與檔案的超快速工作空間,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Capture aims to be an operating system for life, helping people track what matters, think through difficult concepts, and tame the day's flood of information.
highlight.zh: Capture 力求成為生活的作業系統,協助人們追蹤重要事項、釐清困難概念,並馴服每日湧入的資訊洪流。

summary.en: Building the operating system for merchants in the developing world.
summary.zh: 為開發中國家商家打造作業系統。

highlight.en: Cuanto lets LatAm merchants instantly launch online to sell over social media, building a storefront, taking payments, and managing fulfillment in one place.
highlight.zh: Cuanto 讓拉丁美洲商家即時上線、透過社群媒體銷售,在單一平台建立店面、處理付款並管理出貨。

summary.en: On-demand ephemeral environments to run manual and automated tests.
summary.zh: 用於執行手動與自動化測試的隨需臨時環境。

highlight.en: Dockup works like CircleCI but lets engineers manually test each code change with their full tech stack, without mocking any services, before merging PRs.
highlight.zh: Dockup 運作如 CircleCI,但讓工程師在合併 PR 前,以完整技術棧手動測試每項程式碼變更,無需模擬任何服務。

summary.en: Maker of the world's most efficient fuel-agnostic engines for industrial power.
summary.zh: 打造全球最高效、燃料無關工業動力引擎的公司。

highlight.en: Intelline's engines run difficult fuels like flare gas, syngas, ammonia, and hydrogen, cut fuel OPEX by 40%, and can switch fuels mid-operation.
highlight.zh: Intelline 的引擎可使用火炬氣、合成氣、氨與氫等困難燃料,降低 40% 的燃料營運成本,並可運行中切換燃料;全尺寸原型已於 2025 年 4 月測試。

summary.en: The first extensible browser for iOS; acquired.
summary.zh: 首款可擴充的 iOS 瀏覽器,已被收購。

highlight.en: Insight introduced extensibility to the iOS browsing experience as the platform's first extensible browser.
highlight.zh: Insight 作為該平台首款可擴充的瀏覽器,為 iOS 瀏覽體驗引入擴充功能。

summary.en: Safe and secure cash management for businesses; acquired.
summary.zh: 為企業提供安全可靠的現金管理服務,已被收購。

highlight.en: InterPrime helps startups manage corporate cash like a Fortune 500 company: keeping it safe, earning a reasonable return, and reassuring investors.
highlight.zh: InterPrime 協助新創像財星 500 大企業般管理公司現金,確保資金安全、賺取合理回報,並讓投資人放心其資本受負責任的管理。

summary.en: Lets users play high-end PC games on a laptop by streaming them; later shut down.
summary.zh: 讓使用者透過串流在筆電上玩高階 PC 遊戲,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Vectordash streamed high-end PC games to laptops, removing the need for powerful local hardware to play demanding titles.
highlight.zh: Vectordash 將高階 PC 遊戲串流至筆電,讓玩家無需強大的本機硬體即可遊玩高需求的遊戲。

summary.en: Delivers affordable renewable energy direct to customers; later shut down.
summary.zh: 直接向客戶提供平價再生能源,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: A licensed Texas retail electric provider, Green Energy Exchange cuts out middlemen to give consumers lower prices and clean-energy generators higher revenue.
highlight.zh: 作為德州持照的零售電力供應商,Green Energy Exchange 去除中間商,為消費者提供更低價格、為潔淨能源發電商帶來更高收益。

summary.en: A company focused on reducing payment fraud.
summary.zh: 專注於降低支付詐欺的公司。

highlight.en: Dyneti Technologies builds technology aimed at reducing payment fraud for businesses.
highlight.zh: Dyneti Technologies 開發旨在為企業降低支付詐欺的技術。

summary.en: Makes existing apartment access smart; acquired by Alarm.com.
summary.zh: 讓既有公寓門禁變智慧的公司,已被 Alarm.com 收購。

highlight.en: Doorport retrofits existing apartment buildings with smart access technology, later acquired by Alarm.com.
highlight.zh: Doorport 為既有公寓大樓改裝智慧門禁技術,後被 Alarm.com 收購。

summary.en: Excepgen is a healthcare company in the Winter 2019 batch.
summary.zh: Excepgen 是 2019 年冬季梯次的醫療保健公司。

highlight.en: Excepgen is a US-based healthcare startup; further details about its specific approach are not provided in the source.
highlight.zh: Excepgen 是一家位於美國的醫療保健新創;原始資料未提供其具體做法的進一步細節。

summary.en: Cutting-edge hydrofoil systems for boatbuilders.
summary.zh: 為造船業者打造的尖端水翼系統。

highlight.en: Valo builds modular integrated hydrofoil systems that let boatbuilders create fast, clean, quiet flying vessels that consume 15x less energy.
highlight.zh: Valo 打造模組化整合水翼系統,讓造船業者製造快速、潔淨、安靜的飛行船艇,能耗減少 15 倍。

summary.en: An AI-powered sleep coach that learns and optimizes your sleep; later shut down.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動、學習並優化你睡眠的睡眠教練,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Hypnos is an AI-powered sleep journal that pairs your mood and daily activities with sleep-tracker data to deliver insights on improving sleep and habits.
highlight.zh: Hypnos 是以 AI 驅動的睡眠日誌,將你的情緒與日常活動結合睡眠追蹤器資料,提供改善睡眠與習慣的洞察。

summary.en: A trade finance company for Indian exporters; acquired.
summary.zh: 為印度出口商提供貿易融資的公司,已被收購。

highlight.en: Seawise Capital provides SMEs with collateral-free working capital by discounting invoices from their large overseas customers.
highlight.zh: Seawise Capital 透過貼現中小企業大型海外客戶的發票,提供免擔保的營運資金。

summary.en: Last-mile delivery for perishables.
summary.zh: 生鮮易腐品的最後一哩配送。

highlight.en: Bentocart focuses specifically on last-mile delivery logistics for perishable goods.
highlight.zh: Bentocart 專注於生鮮易腐品的最後一哩配送物流。

summary.en: The best place to talk and play multiplayer games with your friends.
summary.zh: 與朋友語音聊天並一起玩多人遊戲的最佳去處。

highlight.en: Rune's SDK lets developers build multiplayer games with no backend code; 50+ games have launched and friends have spent 50M+ minutes playing on voice chat.
highlight.zh: Rune 的 SDK 讓開發者無需後端程式碼即可打造多人遊戲;已上線逾 50 款遊戲,朋友們已在語音聊天中共玩超過 5,000 萬分鐘。

summary.en: A biotech developing non-hormonal contraceptives for both women and men.
summary.zh: 為女性與男性開發非荷爾蒙避孕藥的生技公司。

highlight.en: YourChoice aims to bring a non-hormonal, on-demand female contraceptive to market, then the first highly effective non-surgical, non-hormonal male option.
highlight.zh: YourChoice Therapeutics 目標推出非荷爾蒙、隨需的女性避孕藥,並進而開發首款高效、非手術且非荷爾蒙的男性避孕方案。

summary.en: A safer way to buy and sell collectibles; later shut down.
summary.zh: 買賣收藏品的更安全方式,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Mage Market is a real-time bid/ask marketplace where experts verify every card before shipping, eliminating counterfeits and fakes.
highlight.zh: Mage Market 是即時買賣報價的市集,專家在寄送前驗證每張卡片,杜絕仿冒與假貨。

summary.en: An app that helps neighboring families meet and help each other.
summary.zh: 協助鄰里家庭相識並互相幫助的應用程式。

highlight.en: Allo strengthens local networks of friends, families, and neighbors, making it less awkward to ask for favors and easier to find social and practical support.
highlight.zh: Allo 強化朋友、家庭與鄰里的在地網絡,讓請求幫忙不再尷尬,並更容易找到社會與實際支援。

summary.en: Canopy (formerly Encarte) is building 1-click checkout for all online stores.
summary.zh: Canopy(前身為 Encarte)為所有線上商店打造一鍵結帳。

highlight.en: Canopy aims to bring frictionless 1-click checkout to every online store, building on its origins as Encarte.
highlight.zh: Canopy 以 Encarte 為基礎,目標為每家線上商店帶來無摩擦的一鍵結帳。

summary.en: Indoor navigation through augmented reality on your phone; later shut down.
summary.zh: 透過手機 AR 進行室內導航,後已結束營運。

highlight.en: Pengram lets anyone map a building with just a phone and set waypoints, primarily helping fire-protection, HVAC, and security techs locate devices in the field.
highlight.zh: Pengram 讓任何人僅以手機即可繪製建築並設定路徑點,主要協助消防、空調與保全技師在現場作業中定位設備。

summary.en: Building the first sensor-enabled marketplace for repeat purchases.
summary.zh: 打造首個以感測器驅動的重複購買市集。

highlight.en: Bottomless uses sensors to automatically trigger repeat purchases, pioneering a marketplace built around replenishment.
highlight.zh: Bottomless 利用感測器自動觸發重複購買,開創圍繞補貨打造的市集。
